title: Reproducibility package for local noncrossing geometry and infrastructure percolation transfer
description: Public, non-sensitive code, derived source tables, generated figures, run manifests and runbooks supporting the manuscript 'Local noncrossing geometry controls when percolation transfers from random graphs to embedded infrastructure'. Raw third-party OpenStreetMap, Geofabrik, GHSL, WDI and benchmark-network source archives are not redistributed; source links and access notes are recorded in DATASETS_AND_LINKS.csv.
